subject: Add activity feed to Community page
description:
From stretch.md: "Showing real-time updates mimics a social network. It triggers reciprocity - when organizers post high-effort updates, donors feel compelled to reward that effort."

Implementation:
- Aggregate recent updates from all active campaigns (campaign.updates[]) into a time-sorted feed
- Add a new bento card or section below the existing grid: "Community Activity"
- Each entry: organizer avatar + name + update title + campaign name + relative time
- Link each entry to the campaign page
- Data already exists in campaigns.json updates[] arrays - no fixture changes needed

Medium scope - new section in CommunityPage.jsx, data aggregation from existing fixtures.

changes: Added activity feed section to CommunityPage between bento grid and active campaigns
Aggregates updates[] from all active campaigns, sorted by date, top 6 shown as cards with avatar, title, content preview
